name: Charles Chrin Community Center
description: Charles Chrin Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Easton, PA. There are 2 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
